sections.text:
(1) This Act may be cited as the Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) Act.
This Act may be cited as the Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) Act.
(2) Section two shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st April, 1993.
Section two shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st April, 1993.
(3) Section three shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st September, 1993.
Section three shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st September, 1993.

The holder of an office specified in the first column of the Schedule shall be paid a salary at the annual rate prescribed for that office in the second column of the Schedule. [As amended by Act No. 20 of 1995 and Act No. 25 of 1996 ]
